scripts.dev: concurrently "npm run dev -w @codequest/auth-service" "npm run dev -w @codequest/learning-service" "npm run dev -w @codequest/api-gateway"
scripts.start: concurrently "npm run start -w @codequest/auth-service" "npm run start -w @codequest/learning-service" "npm run start -w @codequest/api-gateway"
